_meta.source_act: Senedd Cymru (Members and Elections) Act 2024 Schedule 1
_meta.method: Each 2026 Senedd super-constituency is formed from a pair of 2024 Westminster (UK Parliament) constituencies. Below: super-constituency slug (matching DC) → list of the two paired Westminster constituency slugs (matching DC parl.* ballot slugs).
_meta.verification: Pairings cross-checked against the Boundary Commission for Wales final-report mapping. Where a pairing is uncertain (e.g. the boundary commission published a working list rather than a final order), the entry carries `confidence: provisional` and a note.

caerdydd-ffynnon-taf.name: Caerdydd Ffynnon Taf
caerdydd-ffynnon-taf.note: Cardiff North + Pontypridd is the most-cited pairing for the 'Caerdydd Ffynnon Taf' (Cardiff Taff Vale) super-constituency. Verify against Boundary Commission for Wales final published mapping when available.

caerdydd-penarth.name: Caerdydd Penarth
caerdydd-penarth.note: Pairs Cardiff South & Penarth with Cardiff East. The remaining Cardiff seat (Cardiff West) is paired into a third grouping (typically with Vale of Glamorgan or Bridgend) — verify against the Act schedule.

pontypridd-cynon-merthyr.name: Pontypridd Cynon Merthyr
pontypridd-cynon-merthyr.note: If Cardiff West is paired here (rather than into Caerdydd Penarth), Pontypridd-Cynon-Merthyr would naturally pair Merthyr+Aberdare with Cardiff West. Alternative: Merthyr+Aberdare paired with the 'Pontypridd' Westminster seat (which would then NOT be in caerdydd-ffynnon-taf). Verify.
